hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git commit|git push' && { BRANCH=$(git -C "${REPO_DIR:-.}" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Direct commit/push to main is not allowed.

Workflow:
1. Create a feature branch: git checkout -b feature/STA-{issue}-description
2. Implement + commit on the feature branch
3. Push: git push -u origin feature/STA-{issue}-description
4. Create PR: gh pr create --title "STA-{N}: Description" --body "Closes #{N}"
5. Merge via PR only

See CONTRIBUTING.md for full conventions."}'; elif echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qvE '^(feature|fix|chore)/STA-[0-9]'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Branch name does not follow convention.

Required format: feature/STA-{issue-number}-description
Examples: feature/STA-23-spring-boot-setup, fix/STA-35-upi-validation

Rename with: git branch -m feature/STA-{N}-description"}'; fi; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"PRE-COMMIT REVIEW REQUIRED. Verify the checklist before committing:

## Backend (backend/)
- No wildcard imports
- Use var for local variables where type is obvious
- @Slf4j on all production classes
- All records have @Builder(toBuilder = true)
- Controllers use Spring MVC @RestController — no WebFlux
- JPA @Entity on persistence entities — not in domain models
- MockMvc for controller tests — not WebTestClient
- Single-assert pattern with recursive comparison
- BDDMockito only (given/then, never when/verify)
- No generic matchers (never any(), anyString(), eq())
- MapStruct for all layer-boundary mapping
- Domain imports: only @Service, @Transactional, Lombok
- Constructor injection via @RequiredArgsConstructor only
- No @Autowired anywhere
- Error codes follow SP-XXXX pattern
- ./gradlew build passes

## Solana (programs/)
- cargo fmt -- --check passes
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- No unwrap()/panic!() in production code
- All PDA bumps stored and reused
- checked_* arithmetic on all token amounts
- Custom errors on all constraints (@ EscrowError::Variant)
- anchor build passes
- anchor test passes

If verified, re-run the commit."}' || true
